name: Northern Storm
description:
Twist a violent storm around you, dealing 1199 Frost Damage every 1 second for 8 seconds to enemies around you and reducing their Movement Speed by 40%. As the storm holds, your damage done increases by 2% every 1 second for 12 seconds, up to 9 stacks max.

You and nearby allies gain Major Protection, reducing your damage taken by 10%.
